column8: Angular red bricks and concrete fragments with some grey, silty SAND. (FILL)

Weak to moderately weak, brownish pink spotted black and white, highly to moderately decomposed, medium to coarse grained GRANITE with medium spaced, very narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained joints, dipping 20-30, 70-80.

Moderately strong to strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed, medium to coarse grained GRANITE, with medium to closely spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite and manganese stained joints, dipping 10-20, 40-60 & 70-80.
